scripts.build: npm run synth:silent && npm run eslint
scripts.configLocal: aws s3 cp s3://$(yarn run --silent getBucket)/config.json claude-tools-chatbot-client/public/
scripts.eslint: ESLINT_USE_FLAT_CONFIG=false NODE_NO_WARNINGS=1 eslint --ext .ts,.tsx --fix --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern src test build-tools
scripts.launch: yarn cdk bootstrap && yarn cdk deploy --require-approval never && yarn configLocal
scripts.upgrade: npx npm-check-updates@20 --upgrade --target=minor --peer --no-deprecated --dep=dev,peer,prod,optional --filter=@types/node,cdk-nag,esbuild,eslint-import-resolver-typescript,eslint-plugin-import,ts-node,typescript,@types/aws-lambda,@types/fs-extra,@types/jest,@types/mocha,dotenv,fs-extra && yarn install --check-files && yarn upgrade @stylistic/eslint-plugin @types/node @typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin @typescript-eslint/parser aws-cdk cdk-nag esbuild eslint-import-resolver-typescript eslint-plugin-import eslint ts-node typescript @types/aws-lambda @types/fs-extra @types/jest @types/mocha aws-cdk-lib constructs dotenv fs-extra
